name: @gotong/example-battle-monk-training
description: 战斗修士锻炼 — a personal-growth hub for the austere: a preceptor (router LLM) drives three pillars (body / mind / lore), each writing the trainee's evolving STATE into a persistent Obsidian-style Codex. Grimdark-monastic aesthetic (original homage). Deterministic, no API key.
